# llms.txt for itsaydrian.com

> This file is intended for LLM crawlers and AI agents. It provides a structured overview of the site and links to key content areas.

## About

itsaydrian.com is the personal site of Aydrian — a one-person studio for travel advising, pet care, and indie software. The site is built with Astro and deployed on Cloudflare Pages.

## Key Content Areas

### Main Site
- [Homepage](https://itsaydrian.com/) — Overview of the studio and primary offerings
- [Privacy Policy](https://itsaydrian.com/privacy) — Site-wide privacy policy
- [Terms of Service](https://itsaydrian.com/terms) — Site-wide terms of service

### Indie Software
- [Tiny Maintenance](https://itsaydrian.com/apps/tiny-maintenance) — App landing page for Tiny Maintenance
  - [Privacy Policy](https://itsaydrian.com/apps/tiny-maintenance/privacy) — App-specific privacy policy
  - [Terms of Service](https://itsaydrian.com/apps/tiny-maintenance/terms) — App-specific terms of service

### Pet Care
- [Atticus's List](https://itsaydrian.com/atticus-list) — Curated Amazon affiliate pet products and recommendations

## Contact & Presence
- Site: https://itsaydrian.com
- Deployed on Cloudflare Pages
- Astro-based static site
